# Excellent Students' Academy (ESA)

> Coaching institute in Rohini Sector 7, New Delhi for Class 1 to 12 students. Math, Science, Commerce, English and all CBSE subjects. Founded 2015. 9+ years of consistent CBSE board results across North Delhi.

Located at C7/72, 2nd Floor, Sector 7, Rohini, New Delhi 110085. Serving students from Rohini, Pitampura, Shalimar Bagh, Model Town, Ashok Vihar, Mukherjee Nagar, Kohat Enclave, Saraswati Vihar, Punjabi Bagh, Rani Bagh, Shastri Nagar and nearby North Delhi localities.

Phone: +91 9458012793 | WhatsApp: +91 8750663995 | Email: info@theesa.in

## Programs

- [Foundation (Class 1 to 5)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-1-5): Concept-building tuition for primary students. Math, English, EVS, Hindi, Computer.
- [Middle School (Class 6 to 8)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-6-8): Structured coaching with weekly chapter tests. CBSE, ICSE and State Boards.
- [Board Prep (Class 9 and 10)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-9-10): CBSE Class 10 board preparation. Full syllabus by January, 10+ mock papers.
- [Senior Secondary (Class 11 and 12)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-11-12): Science (PCM/PCB), Commerce and Arts streams. Board scoring plus JEE/NEET foundation.
- [Crash Courses](https://www.theesa.in/programs#crash): 4 to 8 week intensive revision before board exams.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.theesa.in): Hero, programs, results, testimonials, demo class booking.
- [About](https://www.theesa.in/about): Story, mission, 9-year timeline, values.
- [Faculty](https://www.theesa.in/faculty): Six senior mentors with 6+ years experience each.
- [Results](https://www.theesa.in/results): Recent CBSE board toppers and statistics.
- [Gallery](https://www.theesa.in/gallery): Classroom, batch and event photos.
- [Contact](https://www.theesa.in/contact): Enquiry form, WhatsApp, phone, location.
- [FAQ](https://www.theesa.in/faq): Common questions about demo classes, fees, batches, subjects.

## Blog (educational + local SEO)

- [Meet the ESA Toppers of 2026](https://www.theesa.in/blog/esa-toppers-2026-class-10-12-rohini): Class 10 and 12 students who scored 90+ in CBSE boards.
- [How to Choose a Coaching Institute in Rohini](https://www.theesa.in/blog/how-to-choose-coaching-institute-rohini-parents-guide): Parent's checklist.
- [5 Things ESA Students Do Differently](https://www.theesa.in/blog/5-things-esa-students-do-differently-rohini-coaching): Habits that drive higher CBSE scores.
- [Best Class 10 Coaching in Rohini](https://www.theesa.in/blog/best-class-10-coaching-rohini): What parents should look for in 2026.

## Key facts about ESA

- Founded 2015 by Mr. Chandan Prajapati (B.Tech Mechanical Engineering)
- 9+ years of operation in Rohini Sector 7
- 500+ students mentored
- 84% average CBSE board score across recent batches
- 32+ students scored above 90% in recent CBSE boards
- 100% pass rate
- Air-conditioned classrooms on two floors
- Weekly Saturday chapter tests + monthly mock exams
- Monthly one-on-one parent meetings
- 7 days of free demo classes for every prospective student
- Faculty-prepared notes for Class 8 to 12
- Home tuition available across Rohini, Pitampura, Shalimar Bagh, Model Town

## Hours

Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM to 8:30 PM. Sunday: Closed (doubt sessions on request).
